name: marketer-pro-monorepo
description: Marketer-Pro — merge full upstream workspace definitions when syncing from canonical remote.

scripts.test:check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:packages
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:packages
scripts.api:internal: npm run build -w @home-link/marketer-api && npm run start:internal -w @home-link/marketer-api
scripts.api:scheduler: npm run build -w @home-link/marketer-api && npm run start:scheduler -w @home-link/marketer-api
scripts.api:campaign: npm run build -w @home-link/marketer-api && npm run start:campaign -w @home-link/marketer-api
scripts.api:brand: npm run build -w @home-link/marketer-api && npm run start:brand-profile -w @home-link/marketer-api
